questions.question: The government has taken ___ measures to control inflation. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: 'Several' indicates multiple measures, which makes contextual sense.

questions.question: She was ___ tired to continue working. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: 'Too...to' construction: too tired to continue is correct.

questions.question: He was awarded a scholarship ___ his academic performance. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: 'Due to' correctly attributes the scholarship to his performance.

questions.question: The company ___ on quality despite financial pressures. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: 'Focused on quality' means the company maintained its emphasis on quality.

questions.question: Not only did he pass, ___ he topped the class. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' is the correct correlative conjunction.

questions.question: Scientists ___ that climate change poses significant risks. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: Scientists warning about risks matches the context of climate change discussion.

questions.question: The proposal was ___ by the board after a long discussion. (Fill in)
questions.explanation: After a long discussion, 'accepted' (or 'rejected') - here 'accepted' is used in a neutral context.
